mode: new image generation with chroma-key alpha extraction
shared_prompt: Orthogonal cardinal top-down game prop for a stylized survival game, controlled perspective only where volume requires it, readable at gameplay scale, muted infected-plains palette, isolated on perfectly flat #ff00ff chroma background, no text, no frame, no cast shadow, no ground patch.

processing.settings: border auto-key, soft matte, threshold 12/220, despill, forced RGBA
processing.validation: transparent border and non-empty alpha bounds

small_rock.prompt_focus: single low weathered fieldstone, moss and lichen, compact 1x1 silhouette

broken_fence.prompt_focus: collapsed rural fence segment, broken posts and rails, horizontal 2x1 silhouette

wood_barrier.prompt_focus: improvised plank barricade, nailed cross-braces, horizontal 3x1 silhouette

fallen_log.prompt_focus: rotting fallen trunk, broken branches and fungal growth, horizontal 3x1 silhouette

ruined_house.prompt_focus: roof-dominant ruined farmhouse footprint, collapsed section, cardinal 4x4 silhouette

abandoned_house.prompt_focus: roof-dominant abandoned rural house, damaged shingles and overgrowth, horizontal 5x3 silhouette

abandoned_car.prompt_focus: rusted abandoned compact car seen from above, vertical 3x2 footprint

dense_vegetation.prompt_focus: dense infected bramble and shrub mass, irregular 3x3 silhouette

crate_common.prompt_focus: closed common supply crate, weathered wood and metal straps, no markings

crate_medical.prompt_focus: closed medical supply crate, pale panels and red medical cross, distinct from common crate
